title: Deleting a Robot
description:
Deleting a Robot

Deleting a standard Robot

Select
	 the Epson RC+ 8.0 menu-[Setup]-[System Configuration].

Select
	 [Controller]-[Robots]-[Robot**].

NOTE:  You can only delete the last robot.

Click
	 the [Delete] button. The message shown below will appear.

Click
	 the [Yes] button. The controller will be restarted.

NOTE:  If you delete only an additional axis from its installed robot, refer to Deleting the additional axes.
